meaning: 萨莫色雷斯岛[希腊](在爱琴海东北部)
examples: Among the well-known sculptures in the collection are the Winged Victory of Samothrace and the Venus DE Milo.
The guide advised us to focus most on the san bao—the three treasures—the Winged Victory of Samothrace, the Venus de Milo, and the Mona Lisa.
Three of the West's premier works of art are here: the statues Victory of Samothrace and Venus de Milo accompany Leonardo da Vinci's most famous painting, the Mona Lisa.
That first day I spent with the first sculpture I saw, the Winged Victory of Samothrace.
The 49-year-old, who was handed a three-year term, has been with the Louvre since 2007 and is leading the restoration of the famed headless Greek sculpture, the Winged Victory of Samothrace.
